zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars於大約1135年出生在蘇格蘭費伏洛哈爾斯時，她的父親Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leuchars17歲，母親Margaret de Lacy28歲。她於大約1152年與Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1203年6月之前在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾朗 巴可比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars于大约1135年出生在苏格兰費伏洛哈爾斯时，她的父亲Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leuchars17岁，母亲Margaret de Lacy28岁。她于大约1152年与Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1203年6月之前在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾朗 巴可比。

nameMeanings.name: FitzNess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Filtness
meanings: English: from Middle English felnesse, with epenthetic -t-. This word had the negative meanings ‘treachery, craftiness’ and ‘ferocity’, and the positive meanings ‘wisdom’ and ‘courage’.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars was born about 1135, in Leuchars, Fife, Scotland, her father, Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leuchars, was 17 and her mother, Margaret de Lacy, was 28. She married Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian about 1152, in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before June 1203, in Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars est née environ 1135, à Leuchars, Fife, Écosse, son père, Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leuchars, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Lacy, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian environ 1152, à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant juin 1203, à Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars um 1135 in Leuchars, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leuchars 17 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Lacy 28. Sie hat um 1152 in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor Juni 1203 in Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars è nata il circa 1135 nel Leuchars, Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leuchars, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Lacy, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian circa 1152, nel Brackley, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del giugno 1203, nel Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leucharsが約1135年にスコットランドフィフレウチャーズで生まれた時，父Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leucharsは17歳，母Margaret de Lacyは28歳であった。約1152年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーでRobert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothianと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1203年6月以前にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアロング ブクビーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars(이)가 대략 1135년 스컷랜드 피프 레우처스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leuchars(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Lacy(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1152년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에서 Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1203년 6월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 론그 벅비에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Leuchars, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leuchars, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Lacy, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian aproximadamente 1152, em Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes junho de 1203, em Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, England: Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars родилась около 1135 г. в местности леучарс, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Ness de Leuchars Lord of Leuchars было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Lacy, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian около 1152 г. в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед июнь 1203 г. в местности лонг буккби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
